title: Add Bee's Dance Show, Soak Kingdom Water Park (2040), and 1 AM Farewell Procession

requirements.summary: Add 'Bee's Dance Show' as a new show attraction in Kid Grove themed land alongside existing attractions with description of bees performing dance routines
acceptanceCriteria: Bee's Dance Show appears in the Kid Grove themed land alongside existing attractions
Show has a clear description related to bees and dancing
Show is visible in the upcoming attractions timeline section

file_operations.description: Add 'Bee's Dance Show' to the Kid Grove themed land's futureShows array. Include the show ID that corresponds to the new show entry. Ensure existing Kid Grove content remains unchanged.

Add a new show entry for 'Bee's Dance Show' with name, description featuring bees performing coordinated dance routines, hauntSeason flag set appropriately, and year field. Include details about the performance style and choreography.

Add the generated image reference for Bee's Dance Show using the workspace file path 'frontend/public/assets/generated/bees-dance-show.dim_800x600.png' in the appropriate shows section of the images mapping object.

Ensure the component properly renders Kid Grove themed land with the new Bee's Dance Show in the futureShows array. Verify image display using the generatedImages mapping and that the show card renders alongside existing Kid Grove content.

requirements.summary: Add 'Soak Kingdom' water park scheduled to open in 2040 with exactly 4 water slides including one tornado slide and three additional slide types
acceptanceCriteria: Soak Kingdom water park appears in the 2040 timeline section
Water park includes exactly 4 slides with distinct types
One slide is explicitly identified as a tornado slide
Each slide has a descriptive name and details

file_operations.description: Add a new upcoming event entry for 'Soak Kingdom' water park scheduled for 2040. Include description highlighting the four water slides: one tornado slide with swirling water effects, and three additional distinct slide types (such as body slide, tube slide, and speed slide). Include year, month, day fields, and featureTransactionType. Describe each slide type's unique features.

Add the generated image reference for Soak Kingdom water park using the workspace file path 'frontend/public/assets/generated/soak-kingdom-waterpark.dim_1200x800.png' in the upcomingEvents section of the images mapping object.

Ensure the component properly renders the Soak Kingdom water park event in the 2040 timeline section. Verify that the event card displays the image from generatedImages, shows all 4 slide descriptions prominently, and maintains visual consistency with existing event cards.

requirements.summary: Add '1 AM Farewell Procession' as a special nightly event occurring on select nights after park closes at 1 AM featuring characters, floats, and theatrical elements
acceptanceCriteria: 1 AM Farewell Procession appears as a special event in the shows or events section
Event is marked as occurring at 1 AM after park closing
Description includes characters, floats, and theatrical elements
Indicates it runs on select nights (not every night)

file_operations.description: Add a new show entry for '1 AM Farewell Procession' with name, description featuring characters, illuminated floats, performers, and dramatic theatrical lighting. Include details about the 1 AM timing, that it occurs after park closing, and runs on select nights only. Set hauntSeason flag appropriately.

Add the generated image reference for 1 AM Farewell Procession using the workspace file path 'frontend/public/assets/generated/farewell-procession-night.dim_1200x600.png' in the shows section of the images mapping object.

Ensure the component properly renders the 1 AM Farewell Procession show card with the generated image, displays the special timing information (1 AM, after park closing), and indicates select nights scheduling. Verify the badge styling distinguishes this as a special late-night event.

requirements.summary: Display all three new additions in appropriate frontend sections with proper rendering, timing, and visual consistency
acceptanceCriteria: Bee's Dance Show renders correctly in the Kid Grove section of upcoming attractions
Soak Kingdom renders correctly in the 2040 timeline section with all 4 slides visible
1 AM Farewell Procession renders correctly in shows/events section with time and schedule info
All three attractions maintain visual consistency with existing attraction cards

file_operations.description: Verify and enhance rendering logic to properly display Bee's Dance Show within Kid Grove themed land card. Ensure the show appears in the futureShows list with appropriate styling, image from generatedImages, and description text. Maintain grouping by opening year and visual consistency with existing themed land attractions.

Verify and enhance rendering logic to properly display Soak Kingdom in the 2040 timeline section. Ensure all 4 water slide descriptions are clearly visible in the event card, the tornado slide is prominently featured, and the generated image renders correctly. Maintain visual consistency with existing upcoming events cards.

Verify and enhance rendering logic to properly display 1 AM Farewell Procession show card. Ensure timing information (1 AM, after closing, select nights) is prominently displayed, the generated nighttime procession image renders correctly, and special event badge styling distinguishes it from regular shows. Maintain visual consistency with existing show cards.
